description:
6 month + 12 months + 12 Months Contract – ASAP start

Develop CI/CD pipelines & automation - Azure/AWS

Multiple Positions Available

SA, WA, ACT, NSW, NT, QLD or TAS

Must have a baseline or higher security clearance

If you believe your are qualified for this role, please apply quickly to avoid missing out.


Job details

Our client, a non-corporate Commonwealth entity is seeking multiple highly skilled Senior DevOps Engineers to work within a small team dedicated to building and maintaining multiple growing platforms and other cloud-based services that support the full application lifecycle. The role works closely with a variety of software development teams, assisting them to onboard new projects within Azure DevOps, implement CI/CD pipelines, and incorporate open-telemetry tooling, empowering them to accelerate software delivery and adopt the principles of a DevOps culture.


Security Clearance
You must be an Australian Citizen and hold an active Baseline or higher security clearance.




Key duties and responsibilities

· Develop and maintain CI/CD pipelines and provide ongoing support for CI/CD toolsets and troubleshoot performance issues.

· Support Azure pipeline development and cloud migration efforts.

· Configure and manage Windows application servers and IIS web applications.

· Maintain documentation and standard operating procedures.

· Automate infrastructure provisioning and configuration for reliable environment management.

· Plan, automate, test, and deploy databases using pipelines.

· Identify and implement process improvements for DevOps workflows.

· Cultivate relationships internally and externally, offering mentorship as needed.

· Manage time and workload effectively to meet project deadlines.




To be successful in this role you will require the following:

· Strong IT infrastructure background with expertise in DevOps methodologies and cloud architecture.

· Proficiency in CI/CD pipelines and automation.

· Effective project management skills, delivering projects on time and within budget.

· Ability to manage client relationships and deliver excellent customer service.

· Practical use of static code analysis and quality tools such as SonarQube.

· Strong knowledge of container technologies (e.g. Docker and Kubernetes), artifact repositories (e.g. JFrog Artifactory) and container security best practices.

· Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to troubleshoot complex technical issues.

· Exposure to other Infrastructure as Code tools (e.g. Terraform)




Please apply with your current resume. Applicants must be willing to undergo pre-employment screening, which may include identity and work rights checks, security clearance verification, and any additional checks requested by the client.

Please note that completion of selection criteria may be required to progress your application. Suitable candidates will be contacted with further instructions.

Please email our relationship manager Cuthbert Richardson at Cuthbert.Richardson@recruitmentcentre.com.au if you believe you're a good fit for this role to organise a confidential discussion, request a copy of RFQ or alternatively apply for the role through this job post.
